case_title: BAJOU SALON & SPA VS. YELP INC et al

ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) - GRANTED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-15-2014 - JUDGMENT.
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FROM YELP REGARDING DISMISSAL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-15-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-15-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT THROUGH COURT CALL. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY MARK S. WELCH--OWNER. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YELP INC. WAS REPRESENTED BY IAN MACBEAN--ASSOC. DIRECTOR, USER OPERATION. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO AMBER K, AND JACK R, AND MARISA L, AND ERICA N BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAY-15-2014 AT 3:30 PM.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED MAY 16, 2014 RETURNED TO COURT ENVELOPE STAMPED, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD"
